specific_question: How did MediConn Solution use sales analytics to increase SME client retention in virtual health care services in 2023?
answer: In 2023, MediConn Solutions segmented SME client data by engagement tier and initiated targeted outreach campaigns. Clients receiving personalized support showed a documented 15% increase in account retention over six months, per CRM analytics.
